subcodes.first_line: Pure Being calleth out in utter nothingness, and proclaimeth: At two times do the denizens of the contingent realm raise their cry [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هستی بحت در نیستی بات ندا میکند و میفرماید در دو هنگام نعیق و فریاد اهل امکان
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @return of the Manifestations of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @thankfulness; gratitude, @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
